headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $62K on US Jobs Miss

article.title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
article.summary: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

headline: FBI Chief Discloses $100M Strategy Holdings 6 Months Late

article.title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
article.summary: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

headline: S&P 500 Drops 1.2% as Tech Stocks Falter

article.title: S&P 500 Erases Jobs-Fueled Gain as Chipmakers Sink: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A selloff in chipmakers drove the S&P 500 lower even as most of its shares rose after a sharp slowdown in US jobs bolstered bets the Federal Reserve won’t raise rates any time soon.

headline: Oil Spikes as Canada Eyes $10B Pipeline Plan

article.title: Carney to Keep North BC Tanker Ban as Alberta to Unveil Pipeline Proposal
article.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.

headline: Securitize Lists on NYSE via Solana, Avalanche Blockchains

article.title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
article.summary: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

headline: SBI Closes Bitcoin Mining Operation Amid Market Volatility

article.title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
article.summary: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.

headline: JPM: Bitcoin Sale Policy Adds $1Bn Risk

article.title: JPMorgan says Strategy’s bitcoin sale policy introduced ‘avoidable’ risk into crypto markets
article.summary: Strategy introduced "avoidable two-way risk" into crypto markets with its recent bitcoin sale policy, according to JPMorgan analysts.

headline: Ireland Seizes 500 Bitcoins in Asset Recovery

article.title: Irish authorities recover another 500 bitcoins from lost Clifton Collins drug stash
article.summary: Onchain data from Arkham Intelligence now shows wallets tagged "Clifton Collins" holding roughly 4,500 BTC.

article.title: US economy undershoots forecasts with 57,000 jobs added in June
article.summary: Hiring slows after 3-month streak of overperformance

headline: $1Bn Revamp Plan Boosts US Infrastructure Stocks

article.title: Trump’s $1bn plan to remake America’s capital
article.summary: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital
